name: P-3 prompt-eval --dry-run reports the planned eval without writing the eval-history file per §2.14
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && rm -rf prompts/eval-history && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -d prompts/eval-history ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
